House rules

  • No parties or events
  • Quiet hours: 10:00 pm – 7:00 am
  • Maximum occupancy: 5 people (registered guests only)
  • No smoking or vaping inside the home
  • No pets (unless a previously approved service dog)
  • Check-in after 3:00 pm · Check-out before 11:00 am
  • Please remove shoes if muddy or wet
  • Do not rearrange furniture
  • Do not use bath towels or bedroom blankets outside
  • Additional charge applies for glitter and board game cleanup
  • Septic system is sensitive — dispose of all items in the garbage bin, not the toilet

⚠ Please report any damage immediately.

Check-out checklist

Check-out time
Before 11:00 am
  • Wash dishes
  • Empty fridge
  • Gather used towels and place on top of the laundry machine
  • Check stove is turned off
  • Dispose of trash — bagged, in the parking lot enclosure
  • Turn off ceiling fans
  • Turn off lights
  • Lock windows, doors, and gates

Your stay

  • Extra cot bed with mattress and pillows in the main bedroom closet · Sheets and blankets in the dresser
  • Beach towels in the main bedroom closet — do not use bath towels outside
  • Dishwasher tablets on the kitchen countertop
  • Laundry detergent tablets on top of the dryer, along with sunscreen, after-sun care, and insect repellent (provided as a courtesy)
  • Lake accessories (beach chairs, floaties, kids' life jackets) in the downstairs deck bin — guests do not have access to the downstairs unit
  • Outdoor shower on the side of the house — please rinse off sand after visiting the lake and hang wet items on the nearby hanger
  • To lock the front door, close it tightly and press the key # for three seconds
  • Sweeteners, salt, pepper, cooking oils, teas, coffee, and cocoa available while supplies last

Safety & fire rules

No outdoor burning of any kind is permitted — including fire pits, candles, or open flames. This is a forested area.

4 external security cameras are on the property: two on the downstairs deck, one in the parking lot, one on the left side of the house.

General safety

  • Lock doors and windows when leaving the property
  • Do not leave food outside — it attracts wildlife (deer, turkeys, foxes, and occasionally bears)
  • Supervise children outdoors at all times
  • Report any safety concerns or damage immediately
  • No smoking or vaping inside
  • Indoor fireplace: use responsibly, never leave unattended, fully extinguish before bed or leaving
  • Fire extinguishers are at the laundry room and on the decks
  • Outdoor terrain is uneven and slippery in places — use caution, especially at night
Local emergency contact
Donna · 209-459-0299

Stay well, tread lightly

We choose non-toxic household products for a healthier, brighter stay.

PTFE & PFOA coating-free pots, utensils, air fryer, pressure cooker, and trays
Plastic-free coffee and tea brewing set
Air purifier — AirDoctor® and a smaller unit
Hypoallergenic linens detergent
Eco-friendly cleaning and personal care products
OEKO-TEX® certified linens
Mineralized alkaline water filter (BPA & BPS free)
